meta.title: Sprint SP-42 summary
meta.subtitle: Goal: Ship saved views to all workspaces

sections.title: Completed
sections.body_markdown:
- **FOO-100** — Saved views shipped to **100%** of workspaces; adoption dashboard live.
- **BAR-22** — Incident workflow: on-call can ack from mobile behind org flag `mobile_ack_v1`.

sections.title: Not completed / carryover
sections.body_markdown:
- **FOO-110** (export PDF): descoped; **CSV** shipped instead — product agreed **day 3**.
- **BAR-30**: blocked on **legal** copy review — carry to **SP-43**; interim tooltip shipped.

sections.title: Velocity / throughput
sections.body_markdown:
- **Committed:** 32 pts; **delivered:** 28 pts. **2** items rolled — see above.
- **Throughput** stable vs. rolling average; **unplanned** work **4 pts** (hotfix) — within policy (**≤15%**).

sections.title: Retro themes
sections.body_markdown:
- **Estimates** were optimistic on **third-party** integrations — default **spike** ticket when vendor unknown.
- **Code review** latency — agreed **WIP cap 2** per author next sprint.
- **Celebrate:** zero rollbacks this sprint; shout-out in **#announcements**.
